name: Art
description:
DDR at the mall's arcade

─── ⋆⋅ ↑ ↓ ⋅⋆ ───

mid-late 2000s | anypov | unestablished relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Arcade at the Mortton Mall
♡ Time: Saturday Evening
♡ Context: Art has been on the DDR machine for a couple of hours now. A small crowd has started to form just to watch him. You notice that the metal dance pad to his left is empty so him so you grab your quarters and head over. Select your difficulty: Beginner, Basic, Difficult, Expert, Challenge (this song has Challenge mode). Are you good? Are you bad? Up to you~ c; or you could be with a group of friends and tell him that he's totally hogging the machine.

CW/TW: He might be a little conceited? Nothing too crazy.

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

NPCs: Noah

Yes yes, I'm making another friend group. ;w; It's typical of me at this point. Dw, I'm still working on the others! Myerburgh is a college town close to Mortton (I have A LOT of plans). Yes, I was a big DDR kid. I played Dance Dance Revolution Konamix on my PS1 when I was like 5 and this was my favorite song: Higher - N.M. feat. Sunny
I then proceeded to burn the rest of the franchise (and so many other games) on CDs for my PS2. That was the life.
creator: arriettyxo
